notes: AUTHORITATIVE BULK SOURCE: CA Dept of Insurance Bail Report for County Clerk Offices (BRCC) at https://cdicloud.insurance.ca.gov/brcc . The public page is Turnstile-gated for the on-screen AJAX search, BUT the PDF endpoint POST https://cdicloud.insurance.ca.gov/brcc/BailReportPDF returns full data WITHOUT solving Turnstile. First GET /brcc to obtain a session cookie + __RequestVerificationToken hidden field, then POST it with form fields pdfSearchCountyNumber, pdfSearchCountyName, pdfSearchReportType, __RequestVerificationToken. Report types: BA=individual bail agents, AG=agencies, BS=solicitors, BP=permittees, FR=fugitive recovery agents. Use pdfSearchCountyNumber=CA (All Counties) for the full statewide list, or FIPS county codes (037=LA, 059=Orange, 065=Riverside, 067=Sacramento, 071=San Bernardino, 073=San Diego) for per-county PDFs.

This export = the statewide BA (individual licensed bail agents) report: 2006 active individual bail agents, parsed from the 95-page PDF (dated printed July 23 2026). Fields name/address/city/zip/license/county are 100% populated and cross-checked (0 missing, 0 duplicate licenses, 46 counties; top: LA 515, Riverside 265, San Diego 175, Orange 153).

PHONE and AGENCY are NOT present in this DOI report (the individual BA listing has only name, license number, business address, city, state, zip, county). To attach agency names, also pull report type AG (124 bail agencies statewide) and join on shared business address. Phone numbers require enrichment from CBAA/GSBAA directories or county sheriff approved-bondsman lists.

For a machine-readable (non-PDF) full extract with additional fields, CA DOI sells the Qualification Data Extract for the Bail List (BA) via order form LIC DE 4 (Producer Licensing mailing lists, https://www.insurance.ca.gov/0200-industry/0130-mailing-lists/mail-lists/misc-lists.cfm) — mailed order + check; Bail Unit (916) 492-3035.

The originally-cited legacy URL interactive.web.insurance.ca.gov/webuser/licw_name_search$.startup is dead (404); current per-license lookup is https://cdicloud.insurance.ca.gov/cal/ (single-record, not bulk).

CBAA (cbaa.com) and Golden State Bail Agents Association member directories, plus county sheriff approved-surety lists (LA/SD/Orange/Riverside/San Bernardino/Sacramento), were NOT scraped in this pass — they are secondary, cover only member subsets, and are best used only to enrich phone/agency onto the DOI backbone above.
